title: Enable Rust coverage in spec runner
description: Install cargo-tarpaulin and verify tools/run_specs.py reports Rust coverage successfully.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Installed cargo-tarpaulin and verified tools/run_specs.py reports Rust coverage via rust/cobertura.xml. Latest run shows rust coverage 0.3% and python coverage 100%.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: tools/run_specs.py completes with rust_coverage ok and reports a coverage percentage.
